bird.name: Várzea thrush
bird.summary: The varzea thrush (Turdus sanchezorum) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found in Brazil, Colombia, and Peru.

locations.name: 圣马丁大区
locations.summary: 聖馬丁大區（西班牙語：Departamento de San Martín）是秘魯中北部的一個大區。面積为51,253.31平方公里，人口为989,973人（2007年）。首府莫約班巴，最大城市塔拉波托。 1906年9月4日建區，並以拉丁…

relations.subject: Várzea thrush
relations.evidence: Howerver, along the Mayo River in Peru's Department of San Martín it inhabits forest and savanna on white sand soils, though these are near várzea areas
